name: conversational-intelligence-reporting
description: Conversational Intelligence Reporting Layer - Dashboard for CI operator results

scripts.deploy:dev: export DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=$(pwd)/.env.dev && cd infra/cdk && npm run deploy -- --context env=dev
scripts.deploy:demo: export DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=$(pwd)/.env.demo && cd infra/cdk && npm run deploy -- --context env=demo
scripts.deploy:poc: export DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=$(pwd)/.env.poc && cd infra/cdk && npm run deploy -- --context env=poc
